name: Conge's Crunch Time
short_description: 'Conge's Crunch Time' is a puzzle game where you solve factory tasks through intuitive drag-and-drop programming. Write code for your robot to clear each level, delve deeper into the factory, encounter new puzzle concepts and data-structure creatures, and uncover the truth.
detailed_description:
Dive into the world of programming with “Conge’s Crunch Time”.

Become a programmer by solving puzzles using nothing but your mouse.

Conge’s Crunch Time is a puzzle game where you solve factory tasks through intuitive, drag-and-drop programming. Each level presents a new assignment that demands logical thinking and problem-solving skills. Write code for your robot to carry out these tasks and venture deeper into the factory. As you progress, you’ll encounter more complex challenges, fresh puzzle concepts, and strange creatures born from data structures.

You play as Conge, newly appointed as the key manager tasked with bringing a shut-down factory back to life. You don’t have to shoulder the mountain of work alone. Use programming blocks to write commands for your robot, and work with mysterious data-structure creatures like Queue and Stack to handle items. Together, you’ll solve complex problems, uncover the truth behind the incidents in the factory, and discover the game-changing technology hidden in its depths.

Conge's Crunch Time features:

  • Intuitive drag-and-drop programming that’s easy for beginners to learn

  • Friendly tutorials for workers on the rise

  • Over 50 factory tasks waiting to be cleared

  • A skip feature to hand today’s work over to tomorrow’s you

  • Helpful creatures that faithfully follow your commands

  • Extra-challenging missions prepared for experts

  • Special rewards for efficient employees

…and one extremely sarcastic robot assistant.

supported_languages: English, Korean, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
